creator: swsirlin@earthlink.net
text:
I have the same problem. Seems to be fixed by fixing the Makefile to 
specify the correct path for the freetype2 includes:

#CONFIGURE_ARGS=        --enable-opi \
#               --with-freetype2-library="${LOCALBASE}/lib" \
#               --with-freetype2-includes="${LOCALBASE}/include/" \
#               --bindir="${PREFIX}/libexec/xpdf"
CONFIGURE_ARGS= --enable-opi \
                 --with-freetype2-library="${LOCALBASE}/lib" \
--with-freetype2-includes="${LOCALBASE}/include/freetype2" \
                 --bindir="${PREFIX}/libexec/xpdf"

then configure, build, install ok.

Sam Sirlin
